title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Ola Cabs Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Ola Cabs Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Ola Cabs Global Group are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ola Cabs Global Group:
Ola Cabs Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs Global Group!
